D:\ProgramFiles\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a
D:\ProgramFiles\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir\objects1.rsp
d:\ProgramFiles\MSYS2\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -shared -Wl,--version-script=F:/ParasiteEngine/SDL/src/dynapi/SDL_dynapi.sym -Wl,--no-undefined -static-libgcc -o ..\Debug\SDL3.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libSDL3.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\SDL3-shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
